plan_name: test1 halfv0.2 frontend test page delivery plan

tasks.description: Inspect the repository frontend structure, identify the page or route to modify, and confirm the simplest implementation path for displaying "\u7528\u4e8ehalfv0.2\u7684\u6d4b\u8bd5".
tasks.expected_output: A clear implementation target, including the frontend framework, entry file, and route or page that will render the test text.

tasks.description: Add or update the frontend page so the browser displays "\u7528\u4e8ehalfv0.2\u7684\u6d4b\u8bd5" as the primary visible content, following the existing project style and avoiding unrelated code changes.
tasks.expected_output: Frontend source changes that render the required text on the target page.

tasks.description: Run the project frontend build or equivalent validation command on the same server, then verify the page renders the required text locally.
tasks.expected_output: Successful build or documented validation result, with confirmation that the page shows "\u7528\u4e8ehalfv0.2\u7684\u6d4b\u8bd5".

tasks.description: Stage only the project output files under outputs/proj-2-07c06f, create a focused commit, and push the result to https://github.com/beautyarbutin/half_test.
tasks.expected_output: A pushed commit in the target repository containing the completed deliverable.
